title: Spear Phishing Investigation
content:
The "Spear Phishing Investigation" playbook is designed to detect patterns that indicates a spear phishing attempt by the attacker.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (Phishing, xsoar-supported).

Use cases: Phishing.

Inputs — DomainSquattingResults: Results of the domain squatting investigation.; KeywordsToSearch: A comma-separated or list of keywords to search in the email body.
for example: name of the organization finance app that the attacker might impost to.; MailBody: The phishing mail body..

Integrations/scripts used: MatchRegexV2.

      version: -1
      name: Save Domain-Squatting result to incident field

      script: Builtin|||setIncident
      type: regular
      iscommand: true
      brand: Builtin
    nexttasks:

    scriptarguments:
      domainsquattingresult:
        complex:
          root: inputs.DomainSquattingResults
          transformers:
          - operator: uniq
          - operator: Cut
            args:
              delimiter:
                value:
                  simple: '@'
              fields:
                value:
                  simple: "2"
          - operator: concat
            args:
              prefix:
                value:
                  simple: The attacker used the domain **
              suffix: {}
          - operator: concat
            args:
              prefix: {}
              suffix:
                value:
                  simple: '** which looks like another domain involved in this incident.'

      description: Extracts regex data from the provided text. The script support groups and looping.
      scriptName: MatchRegexV2
      type: regular
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:

      - "17"

      data:

          transformers:

            args:
              delimiter:
                value:
                  simple: ','
